title: Mounted Local Catalogue Editor API
summary: Moved catalogue editor save, bulk-save, build, publication, delete, prose import, and moment import browser calls onto `/studio/api/catalogue/...` in the local Studio app and stopped default startup of the standalone catalogue write server.
effect: Catalogue editor routes no longer need the standalone `127.0.0.1:8788` service from the browser or default `bin/dev-studio` startup. The local app adapter invokes the existing catalogue write handler in-process, preserving current validation, backups, lookup refresh, build follow-through, and Studio Activity behavior while consolidating endpoint ownership.
